author: Verified Reviewer
pros: We used this to store data and share file with each other in the company. It integrated easily with our workflow and helped us tremendously. The formats were preserved which was a plus.
cons: Nothing much that I dislike. The setup might be a little complicated for non-tech savvyy people but nothing much to complain about
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I have no doubts about purchasing this software after my free trial session.
author: Susie S.
pros: One thing I have learnt with Tiger Bridge is how flexible it is to work with. I quickly mastered the features and doing great so far. It is quite fast to install which is impressive.
cons: Dealing with multiple groups is not easy. Third party integration has really been an issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Unlimited capacity Cloud Storage services makes it unique
description: The starter subscription plan has all the features available which gives a great exposure. It created a lasting experience for me.
author: Jolly M.
pros: The software is best at what it does. The most impressive part being the storage which can cover huge data and it expandable. It is also easy to customize the software.
cons: You'll be needed to pay more for advanced services after the free trial. It is however affordable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: samson T.
pros: Like using Tiger Bridge for file sharing and data management for campus resources and between faculty and student members.
cons: I am still discovering the software and found no issues while using it.

author: Charles S.
pros: The software comes with many features that are used on college campuses. The software provides file-sharing capability and allows staff to share files internally and securely.
cons: I hope to add more features regarding file sharing. Add a learning platform.

review_title: It makes it easy to send files quickly and securely
description: We benefited from Tiger Bridge in supporting our ability to send and receive files quickly and securely. We also benefited from the documentation capabilities it provides us and the records that contain all the data and contacts that were dealt with.
author: Nadine K.
pros: I liked the smoothness of Tiger Bridge in transferring files and the speed with which the transfer was carried out. It is great that uploading files does not require a lot of effort. I liked the smoothness of the steps and the ease of creating contacts and sending links to them directly. I also like the notices that document the other party’s receipt of the tie and their uploading of the attached documents. This documentation is very important to ensure that sending and receiving have been done properly.
cons: There are no difficulties with Tiger Bridge, all tools are easy to use and highly efficient.

review_title: Effortless Data Management and Seamless Cloud Integration
description: Tiger Bridge really changed the way we do data management. Both easy and secure, it integrates cloud storage with on-premises infrastructure. The transition was quite seamless, except that our workflow efficiency increased substantially.
author: Vagelis K.
pros: I've particularly been impressed with Tiger Bridge's seamless handling and archiving of vast amounts of data. Because of this, its transparent integration into our existing applications meant we could expand our storage capabilities without an additional fuss and cost to our pocket while making sure that data protection and disaster recovery continued without any problem in our workflow.
cons: The only minor hassle is the initial set up, which can seem a bit complex. But this again is a very small cost for all the significant advantages which it has to offer in the long term.

author: blake J.
pros: Tiger Bridge is my favorite service and tool used for data storage and data sharing (files sharing) within staff.
cons: Everything works as expected and no problems found up to this time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Tiger Bridge easy for files sharing.
author: Lindsay C.
pros: It is easy to use for sharing files within groups smoothly and securely. The service provides easy interface for uploading and receiving files.
cons: Up to this date, did not find any problem using the service for files sharing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: shields G.
pros: I am running the services for trial period and like the features of cloud storage and files sharing
cons: For the trial period, you cannot unlock the advanced features unless you pay for a subscription.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: lawrence O.
pros: Tiger Bridge is one of the best software and tool for cloud storage due to its performance and unlimited storage services plus more features and options gives users more flexibility and freedom of use.
cons: For more advanced capacity you have to pay more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Enormous organizational capabilities to support data transfer and storage with minimal effort
description: With Tiger Bridge we have created the best and most flexible solution for data sharing and storage. It's amazing how all processes have become smoother and more efficient.
author: rawan M.
pros: I loved Tiger Bridge's ability to simplify saving and sharing data, especially large data. It is great that this simplicity enabled us to create an organized path for data flow between team members and also with customers.
cons: I didn't notice any negatives with the Tiger Bridge, everything is as expected. The ease of use and available features are worth appreciating.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great integration but can do better
description: I am hopeful for the best. It is a tool I would like to keep since it has a promising future.
author: Andrea S.
pros: Among the general benefits I have experienced using this software is ease of launching and integration. The customer support team is also active.
cons: I experience delays in accessing some files. It takes time to load.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Giovanni Luca D.
pros: Ho usato questo software di gestione dati per lavoro e mi sono trovato bene. I miei dati sono stati archiviati localmente con l'archiviazione su cloud ed è stato preservato il formato.
cons: L'installazione del software non è stata immediata. Inoltre ho riscontrato un po' di lentezza nel caricamento dati, seppur sporadica.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
